settings.editor:
Product Description

Step into elegance with this beautifully crafted Anarkali suit set. The gown boasts a dramatic flare and premium inner lining for maximum comfort during long events. Complete with a matching pant and an embroidered shawl-style dupatta, this outfit is designed to make a statement at weddings and festive gatherings.

Top (Anarkali)

Fabric & Lining: Tailored from heavy pure Roman Chanderi silk fabric with a premium pure microscrape full inner lining.

Work & Details: Enhanced with exquisite yoke fancy handwork featuring detailed beads work. Designed with full churidar sleeves styled with fancy beads lacework, a side zipper for a seamless fit, and decorative fancy tassels on the backside.

Volume & Pattern: Crafted in a stunning 16 kali pattern layout that flows into an impressive 4-meter full flare gown, structured with an attached bottom canvas patta.

Length: Anarkali gown length measures approximately 48 to 49 inches.

Bottom (Pant)

Fabric: Made from premium quality micro cotton silk fabric.

Fit: Fully stitched free-size pants designed to offer effortless comfort and style.

Dupatta

Fabric: Made from premium matching pure Roman Chanderi silk fabric.

Fit: Fully stitched free-size with 38-39 inch length pants crafted for elegant style and reliable daily comfort.

Wash Instructions

First Wash: Dry clean recommended to maintain the fabric texture and sequence work.

Subsequent Washes: Gentle hand wash separately in cold water using a mild liquid detergent.

Care Advice: Do not wring or twist. Dry in shade away from direct sunlight to prevent color fading. Iron on low heat on the reverse side only.
